sigWerErrors.reason: 'Elime' means 'to my hand' (i.e., 'I have not received it'), while 'yerime' means 'to my place' (i.e., 'to my location'). This changes the meaning of the sentence, as the original refers to personal receipt, while the mistranscription refers to location. The overall intent is still somewhat understandable, but the meaning is altered.
